name: Sincere Security Co. Ltd.
summary: Sincere Security Co. Ltd. engages in the property management, electrical maintenance, environmental friendly cleaning, and security businesses. The company offers community, factory, and parking lot property management; and director general, administrative secretary, and other manpower dispatch services, as well as generator equipment installation and maintenance, electrical maintenance, central air conditioning system installation and maintenance, air conditioning cooling tower cleaning, water system repair and replacement, fire equipment installation and maintenance, and monitoring system installation services. It also provides environmental friendly cleaning services, such as airport, station, hospital, and building cleaning; floor waxing polishing; stone crystallization grinding; carpet, sofa chair, and office chair sterilization; disinfection; pool cleaning and water quality inspection; exterior wall cleaning; gardening planting; and waste removal services. In addition, the company offers security services, including guardian, system, and personal security, as well as central monitoring system control management services. It serves science parks, hypermarkets, commercial buildings, schools, golf courses, villas and residential areas, and government units. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.
